trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price retests EMA50 ($72,455) or EMA20 ($73,254) and shows bullish candle on 1h timeframe.
trade_plans.invalidation: Price closes below EMA200 ($71,959) on 4h timeframe.
confluence_signals: Long/Short Ratio: EXTREME short crowd (contrarian bullish)
Fear & Greed Index: Extreme Fear (contrarian buy)
Price-Volume Divergence: Price falling with LOW volume (weak selling)
Open Interest: RISING + price rising (healthy buildup)
Funding Velocity: decelerating negative (flush momentum fading)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Long/Short Ratio EXTREME short crowd (contrarian bullish), Fear & Greed Index Extreme Fear (contrarian buy), Price falling with LOW volume (weak selling), and bullish EMA alignment suggest a strong bounce potential on dips. However, Hyperliquid Smart Money STRONG_BEARISH and negative funding rate introduce significant counter-risk, reducing the win rate from a higher base.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Rejection at $2,395.85 resistance, e.g., 1h close below $2,390.
confluence_signals: Funding Rate: EXTREME bullish positioning (long squeeze risk)
Funding Velocity: Accelerating negative (flush building, longs paying more)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: RSI_1h overbought, EXTREME positive Funding Rate with accelerating negative Funding Velocity (flush building), and Hyperliquid Smart Money STRONG_BEARISH indicate high long squeeze risk. Price at resistance further supports a short. Conflicting extreme short retail crowd is noted but overridden by funding and smart money dynamics for an immediate short.
